ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "story_title" TEXT /* Title of the story (if available) */,
  "story_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the content type */,
  "story_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the story */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue (if available) */,
  "issue_series" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_number" INTEGER /* Issue number within the series */,
  "issue_volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the issue */,
  "issue_page_count" INTEGER /* Total number of pages in the issue */,
  "issue_isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the issue */,
  "issue_price" TEXT /* Price of the issue */,
  "issue_format" TEXT /* Format of the issue (e.g., hardcover, softcover, digital) */,
  "issue_language" TEXT /* Language of the issue */,
  "issue_print_run" INTEGER /* Number of copies printed */,
  "issue_digital_release_date" TEXT /* Date the digital version of the issue was released */,
  "issue_digital_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the digital version is available */,
  "issue_distribution_status" TEXT /* Distribution status of the issue (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "on_sale_date" TEXT /* Date the publication went on sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_story_type FOREIGN KEY ("story_type") REFERENCES content_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_issue_series FOREIGN KEY ("issue_series") REFERENCES issue_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "publisher_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "publisher_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  "publisher_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "publisher_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the publisher */,
  "publisher_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's logo */,
  "publisher_social_media" TEXT /* Links to the publisher's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "series_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the series started */,
  "series_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the series ended */,
  "series_description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "series_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the series */,
  "series_creative_team" TEXT /* Key creative team members */,
  "series_print_frequency" TEXT /* How often the series is published */,
  "series_rated_age" TEXT /* Age rating of the series */,
  "series_cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the series cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "type_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon representing the content type */,
  "type_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, marketer, distributor) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "user_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Number of pages in the story
Reference to the series the issue belongs to
Total number of pages in the issue
Format of the issue (e.g., hardcover, softcover, digital)
Date the digital version of the issue was released
Platform where the digital version is available
Distribution status of the issue (e.g., in stock, out of stock)
Date the publication went on sale
Contact email for inquiries about the publisher
Contact phone number of the publisher
Links to the publisher's social media profiles
How often the series is published
URL of the series cover image
Unique identifier for each content type
URL of an icon representing the content type
Keywords associated with the content type
Role of the user (e.g., editor, marketer, distributor)
Contact phone number of the user
